## Checklist
- [ ] I tested the changes locally in a modern browser.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys or tokens are committed.
- [ ] All new external resources use HTTPS.
- [ ] HTML still validates and the site loads without console errors.
- [ ] I updated the README / docs if user-visible behavior changed.
